ham.subject: Important Update: Company Leave Policy Effective June 1, 2026
ham.body:
Dear Team,

We hope you are doing well. Please be advised that effective June 1, 2026, the company will be implementing several updates to our leave policy.

Key changes include:
- Increased paid vacation days by 5 days per year.
- Introduction of flexible remote‑work leave.
- Extended sick leave eligibility to new hires.
- Updated guidelines for unpaid leave requests.

Please review the full policy document attached to this email. If you have any questions, contact HR at hr@example.com.

Thank you for your attention.

Best regards,
Human Resources

spam.subject: Urgent: IT Helpdesk Ticket #4523 – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

This is an automated message from the IT Helpdesk. A critical security incident has been detected on your workstation. As part of our compliance protocol, you must reset your password immediately.

Please click <URL> to complete the password reset and confirm that your account is secure. Failure to comply by 5:00 PM today will result in temporary suspension of system access.

For any questions, reply to this email or call the IT Support hotline at 1-800-555-0100.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
IT Helpdesk Team
